---
title: "TB in vitro mixture dataset"
output: 'github_document'
---


```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
iv_bench_metrics <- readRDS('03/iv_bench_metrics.rds')
```

```{r}
iv_bench_metrics %>% 
  select(method, nMCC, sensitivity = recall, specificity, `1-MAE`) %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ format(round(., 3)))) %>% 
  writexl::write_xlsx('Table1.xlsx')
```
